title: poa calycina
intro: Poa calycina, also known as Poverty grass or Alpine Poa, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The medicinal properties of Poa calycina are attributed to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. Poa calycina can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to treat skin conditions.
